---
title: "Data Synthesis"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

::: {style="text-align:center"}

Data for this research are collected from a wide range of sources: from published studies, La Selva researchers themselves, databases, and fieldwork.

:::

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}
![](images/ots_logo.jpg)
:::

::: {.column}
![](images/inat_logo.png)
:::

::: {.column}
![](images/gbif_logo.png)
:::

::::
